body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Instead of adding the surface temperatures of each surface model, this PR changes to convert them to longwave radiation, sum them, then convert back to temperature.

closes #1492

## Content
- [x] sum LW flux instead of temp for each surface model
- [x] reduce allocations in `combine_surfaces!` by using `temp1` to hold area fractions
- [x] update the surface emissivity stored in the atmosphere by calling `update_field` for emissivity inside `update_sim` for the atmosphere model
- [x] delete empty file `experiments/ClimaEarth/components/ocean/clima_ocean.jl`
- [x] check results compared to [previous build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/6954#_)
  - no changes


<!---

- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: compute T_sfc from longwave fluxes for radiation
